Issues: The image is extremely simple (flat design). While this is a strength for certain markets, it lacks complex artistic depth or unique subject matter that would appeal to a broad audience seeking high-end graphic design.
The uniqueness factor is low, as minimalist running silhouettes are a common motif in fitness and lifestyle design.
The technical execution is basic but clean, which is suitable for digital assets but limits its appeal for high-priced, complex commercial art.
